videos.headline: Georgia completes comeback vs. Tennessee with winning TD in OT
videos.description: Georgia running back Josh McCray muscles in the end zone to finish off the Bulldogs' comeback in overtime against Tennessee.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia completes comeback vs. Tennessee with winning TD in OT) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia Bulldogs vs. Tennessee Volunteers: Full Highlights
videos.description: Georgia Bulldogs vs. Tennessee Volunteers: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia Bulldogs vs. Tennessee Volunteers: Full Highlights) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: Josh McCray runs No. 6 Georgia past No. 15 Tennessee
videos.description: Josh McCray scores twice, including the game-winning touchdown in overtime, as Georgia edges Tennessee 44-41 in a thriller to remain undefeated.

tracking.trackingName: SEC_NCF Highlight (UGA over TENN) 250913

videos.headline: Joey Aguilar finds pay dirt to put Tennessee on the board
videos.description: The crowd goes wild as Joey Aguilar crosses the goal line for a Volunteers touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Joey Aguilar finds pay dirt to put Tennessee on the board) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gunner Stockton answers with a rushing TD of his own
videos.description: Gunner Stockton keeps it himself and finds the end zone for a Bulldogs touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gunner Stockton answers with a rushing TD of his own ) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Joey Aguilar finds Chris Brazzell II 72-yard Tennessee TD

videos.headline: Gunner Stockton is all smiles after Georgia takes down rival Tennessee
videos.description: The No. 6 Bulldogs' quarterback credits his offensive line's physicality and describes how great it feels to get a rivalry win in an electric atmosphere at No. 15 Tennessee.

tracking.trackingName: SEC_NCF Interview (Gunner Uga Tenn) 250913

videos.headline: Kirby Smart on UGA's win: 'These kids I got, they never quit'
videos.description: Smart reflects on the Bulldogs' offensive performance and Gunner Stockton's ability to remain a force in the pocket in order to secure the win against the Volunteers.

tracking.trackingName: SEC_NCF Interview (Georgia kirby interview) 250913
